case_title: ELIZABETH BRETT et al VS. ISA MUHAWIEH et al

CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BRETT, ELIZABETH BRETT, JENNIFER LYNN JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 8.0 DAYS
OBJECTION TO NTC OF TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT MUHAWIEH, ISA MUHAWIEH, MIGDALIA FRANCISCAN PROPERTIES DBA PRUDENTIAL REALTY SPEARS, STEVEN L. DBA PRUDENTIAL REALTY MURRAY, JACK A.

DISCOVERY 612, TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT ISA MUHAWIEH'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND FORM INTERROGATORIES DIRECTED TO PLAINTIFF JENNIFER BRETT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER BRETT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST PLAINTIFF JENNIFER BRETT IN THE AMOUNT OF $543.80, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (612/HEWLETT)

DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANT ISA MUHAWIE'S MOTION FOR TERMINATING SANCTIONS OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE, FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF JENNIFER BRETT FOR FAILURE TO OBEY COURT ORDER. NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: GRANTED AS IT SEEKS TERMINATING SANCTIONS. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. THE COURT FINDS THAT ADDITIONAL ORDERS TO PARTICIPATE IN DISCOVERY AND ADDITIONAL MONETARY SANCTIONS WOULD NOT RESULT IN COMPLIANCE. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER BRETT'S COMPLAINT IS ORDERED DISMISSED. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AND ENTIRE ACTION
